mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 5.0%, restrictive policy raises the discount rate on future equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days relative to periods with lower rates.
failure_condition: Mean 20d forward return during FEDFUNDS>5.0% regime is not significantly lower than unconditional mean (t-test p>0.05), or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A persistent upward drift in UNRATE over the trailing 3 months signals deteriorating labor market conditions and slowing consumer income growth, which depresses corporate earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rolling correlation between UNRATE trend slope and forward 60d SPX return is not negative and statistically significant (p>0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous acceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) and HOUST (housing starts) reflects broad-based consumer and investment demand strength that jointly signals robust near-term economic momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days; neither series alone captures this synergy.
regime_hint: expansion phase with rising consumer and housing demand
failure_condition: Joint-trigger instances show forward 20d return win rate <= unconditional base rate, or interaction term coefficient is not significant (p>0.05) after controlling for individual series effects.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in INDPRO indicate expanding industrial output and improving supply-side conditions, which are quickly priced into equities and generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO monthly change and forward 5d SPX return falls below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is elevated above 5% while CPIAUCSL inflation remains sticky (year-over-year change not decelerating), markets price a prolonged tightening regime with no near-term pivot, compounding valuation pressure and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days. This mechanism requires both conditions jointly; high rates alone with falling inflation would not trigger it.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 5.0% AND CPIAUCSL YoY change not declining for 3 consecutive months
failure_condition: Forward 60d SPX returns during joint-trigger periods are not significantly more negative than during FEDFUNDS-high-only periods (p>0.05), refuting the interaction premise.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in PAYEMS month-over-month growth below a threshold signals an inflection toward labor market weakening, prompting risk-off repricing in equities and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Triggered instances of PAYEMS deceleration show forward 20d return win rate >= 50%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During monetary tightening regimes (FEDFUNDS above 5%), declines in HOUST (housing starts) signal rate-sensitive demand destruction that foreshadows broader economic slowdown, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days; the same HOUST decline in an easing regime does not carry the same predictive power.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with rate-sensitive housing weakness
failure_condition: HOUST decline during high-FEDFUNDS regime fails to produce significantly more negative forward 60d returns than HOUST decline during low-FEDFUNDS regime (p>0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deterioration in INDPRO (falling industrial output) and rising UNRATE reflects a compounding real-economy contraction across supply and labor channels, which produces sharply negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as markets rapidly reprice growth expectations; neither weak INDPRO nor rising UNRATE alone triggers this acute signal.
failure_condition: Joint-trigger instances produce forward 5d return win rate for negative direction <= 50%, or the interaction effect is not significant beyond the sum of individual series effects (p>0.05).
